statement: In every magma, Equation 1360 (`x = y * (((z * x) * z) * w)`) implies Equation 3574 (`x * y = y * ((z * z) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0959
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z x) z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op (op z z) y))
